revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十六]][[zh:七月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 16|qq=July 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|qid=Q329723|lt=Keien|1=Emperor Keikō}} 40th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|110|en|110|qid=Q170338|lt=110|1=110}} {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}}) – {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|qid=Q329723|lt=Emperor Keien|1=Emperor Keikō}} ordered the subjugation of the Eastern barbarians by dispatching an expedition against the Eastern Yi. * {{ill|Ninji|en|Ninji|qid=Q1194262|lt=Ninji|1=Ninji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1240|en|1240|qid=Q5435|lt=1240|1=1240}} {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}}) – Due to the appearance of a comet, an earthquake, and drought, the era name was changed from {{ill|En'ō|en|En'ō|qid=Q1193942|lt=En'ō|1=En'ō}} to {{ill|Ninji|en|Ninji|qid=Q1194262|lt=Ninji|1=Ninji}}. * {{ill|Bun'ō|en|Bun'ō|qid=Q1199883|lt=Bun'ō|1=Bun'ō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1260|en|1260|qid=Q5508|lt=1260|1=1260}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}}) – {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q311478qid=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} authored the treatise {{ill|Risshō Ankokuron|en|Risshō Ankokuron|qid=Q11598026|lt=Rittō Ankoku Ron|1=Risshō Ankokuron}} and submitted it to {{ill|Hōjō Tokiyori|en|Hōjō Tokiyori|qid=Q1354410|lt=Hojo Tokiyori|1=Hōjō Tokiyori}}.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://hodoin.net/daishonin2.html|title=Nichiren大聖人のご生涯|work=Nichiren正宗 法道院 法華講|accessdate=2020-07-16|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * {{ill|Genki (era)|en|Genki (era)|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki|1=Genki (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}} {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}}) – {{ill|Satake Yoshinobu|ja|佐竹義宣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Yoshinobu|qq=}}, lord of the Echizen, Ōno, Yamagata, and Himeji Domains (died {{ill|1633|en|1633|qid=Q6870|lt=1633|1=1633}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1668|en|1668|qid=Q7595|lt=1668|1=1668}} {{ill|August 23|en|August 23|qid=Q2821|lt=August 23|1=August 23}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiro|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiro|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11530383}}, lord of the Matsue Domain (died {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1721|en|1721|qid=Q6913|lt=1721|1=1721}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munetada|en|Tokugawa Munetada|qid=Q3530490|lt=Tokugawa Sōin|1=Tokugawa Munetada}}, the first head of the Hitotsubashi-Tokugawa clan (died {{ill|1765|en|1765|qid=Q7665|lt=1765|1=1765}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}) – {{ill|Ikeda Shigeaki|en|Ikeda Shigeaki|qid=Q3148403|lt=Ikeda Narimasa|1=Ikeda Shigeaki}}, a politician (died {{ill|1950|en|1950|qid=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kagen|en|Kagen|qid=Q1327409|lt=Kagen|1=Kagen}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1304|en|1304|qid=Q5619|lt=1304|1=1304}} {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|en|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|qid=Q349246|lt=Go-Fukakusa Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Fukakusa}}, the 89th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1243|en|1243|qid=Q5438|lt=1243|1=1243}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|qid=Q6680|lt=1574|1=1574}}) – {{ill|Lady Goryū|en|Lady Goryū|qid=Q11372740|lt=Goryōkyoku|1=Lady Goryū}}, the consort of Shishido Takayoshi (and daughter of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|qid=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1617|en|1617|qid=Q6798|lt=1617|1=1617}} {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}}) – {{ill|Maeda Matsu|en|Maeda Matsu|qid=Q836600|lt=Hōshun-in|1=Maeda Matsu}}, the wife of {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|en|Maeda Toshiie|qid=Q1196817|lt=Maeda Toshiie|1=Maeda Toshiie}} (born {{ill|1547|en|1547|qid=Q6547|lt=1547|1=1547}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1720|en|1720|qid=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – {{ill|Manabe Akifusa|en|Manabe Akifusa|qid=Q6746560|lt=Mamabe Senbō|1=Manabe Akifusa}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo and a chamberlain (born {{ill|1666|en|1666|qid=Q7585|lt=1666|1=1666}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|en|Shimazu Nariakira|qid=Q1143856|lt=Shimazu Nariakira|1=Shimazu Nariakira}}, lord of the Satsuma Domain (born {{ill|1809|en|1809|qid=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}}). * In the same Ansei 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1858, {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}}) – {{ill|Takami Izumiishi|ja|鷹見泉石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takami Izumiishi|1=Takami Senseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531605}}, a Rangaku scholar (born {{ill|1785|en|1785|qid=Q7756|lt=1785|1=1785}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Bon Send-Off Fire|ja|盆送り火|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yabuiri|ja|藪入り}} * {{ill|Enma's Festival Day|ja|閻魔賽日|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藪入り|1=Yabuiri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625091}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|15|7|17|6|16|8|7|0716|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
